event: Interior view of St. Peter's Basilica in Rome
description: A grand interior view of St. Peter's Basilica in Rome, looking down the enormous nave. Massive pilasters and arches line both sides, supporting a richly coffered barrel vault ceiling decorated with gilded panels. Shafts of light enter from high windows, illuminating the vast interior where small groups of visitors are dwarfed by the architectural scale. Statuary, paintings, and decorative elements fill the walls and side chapels. The perspective draws the eye deep into the space toward the distant altar area.

_meta.title: Interior of St Peter's in Rome
